title: Neste and World Fuel Services Extend Partnership to Supply SAF to 100+ European Airports
content:
Neste and World Fuel Services have signed a five-year agreement to expand the availability of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) across more than 100 airports in the UK and Europe. This extension leverages World Fuelâ€™s extensive distribution network and Nesteâ€™s growing production capacity to serve commercial, business, and general aviation customers. The partnership is designed to ensure reliable supply for compliance with upcoming regulations, including the ReFuelEU Aviation Regulation and the UK SAF mandate.
Neste, which currently produces up to 500,000 tons of SAF annually at its Rotterdam refinery, is scaling its total global capacity to 2.2 million tons by 2027. By combining Nesteâ€™s production with World Fuelâ€™s logistics, the deal aims to provide consistent, scalable access to cleaner fuel where it is needed most to decarbonize the aviation sector.
author: Analysts Account
